chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-113 0f 2024 Dat٤ Order with signature Of JudBe For ordgrs on office oblections For hearing of maln case 31.01.2024 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari Advocate for the Petitioners Mr Zeeshan Hyder Qureshi Law Officer ECP Mr Dareshani Ali Haider ' Ada', DAG Mr Ali Raza Balouch, AAG with Raz Munammad Snar Returning Officer, PS-32 H74 ٦٣٣+ 44 + ٣ت Petitioners are voters of constituency NA-ZO5 & PS-3Z and have filed this petition for establishment of a polling station at Government Boys Primary School Razi Kalhoro situated Deh Salehpur on the ground that current polling station situated in village Kot Ghulam Shah fifteen (15| kilometers away from the petitioners' houses This petition has been objected by the other side including Counsel representing Election Commission Pakistan Returning Officer PS-32 is present and submits that in General Election-2018 the polling station was not established at the given place and the polling station which was established then ha5 been retained H٤ further submits that distance of current polling station is only two (2/ to three kilometers from the houses of petitioners We have heard the parties and find no reason having basis 0n statutory provision to allow this petition The current polling station in Kot Ghulam Shah is only two to three kilometers away from village houses and cannot be termed as inconvenient No case petitioners is made out Instant petition stands dismissed along for indulgence with pending } applicationtsl If any 3١0n8
